caption: A man with short brown hair, wearing a dark blazer over a dark button-down shirt, stands behind a light-colored podium against a plain, light-gray background. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. In the first frame, he gestures outward with both hands; in the second, he brings his hands closer together in front of him; in the third, he extends his right hand outward while looking toward the side; and in the fourth, he brings his hands back down toward the podium. A thin gooseneck microphone and a clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap sit on the podium in front of him. The logo "mediasite by cornerstone" is visible in the top left corner of each frame.
